name: Par2play
about: Par2play is an indoor golf simulator venue located in Somerset, New Jersey. The facility features climate-controlled hitting bays equipped with tour-level technology and high-speed cameras to capture every swing. They offer a range of services including simulator bay rentals, golf lessons, and event hosting. The venue aims to provide a comfortable and fun environment for golfers of all skill levels, with a focus on accessible technology and social play. Members receive benefits such as complimentary club fittings, priority bookings, and discounts on services and events.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art tour-level simulator technology with high-speed cameras
Complimentary premium golf club rentals with each bay rental
Flexible event space suitable for both corporate and private gatherings
Membership program with exclusive benefits like club fittings and priority bookings
Instructors who are PGA Professionals with extensive teaching experience

food_and_drink.notes: Available for order during play via QR code or by speaking with a Bay Host

simulator_hardware.notes: Tour-level technology with high-speed cameras used for swing analysis

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, complimentary premium golf clubs are provided with every bay rental. You can also use your own clubs if you prefer.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Food and drinks are available for order during your session via a QR code or by speaking with a Bay Host. There is no mention of outside food or drink policies.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide a specific time for 18 holes. Play time varies depending on the course and group pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Par2play is described as a place where everyone can have fun, and it offers a comfortable environment for families with its climate-controlled bays and sports bar atmosphere.
